name: Viktor
description:
Make your own story bot.

─── ･ ｡ﾟ⟡ 🌑 ⟡ ˚｡ ･ ───

Heavy, heavy WIP. If it acts up because of LLm that’s not my fault! But please leave reviews on if y’all like this or not because if it works (praying it does) that I’ll make a Jayce version. And maybe Silco and Vander because the old men need some love <3

─── ･ ｡ﾟ⟡ 🌑 ⟡ ˚｡ ･ ───

Jayce is hard coded in, both season 1 and 2.

Season 1 and 2 Viktor are all hard coded so you can pick which one you wanna talk to!

Copy and pasted wiki lore (will probably change it later) but it should be accurate.

No astral form unfortunately because I’m tired of typing.

─── ･ ｡ﾟ⟡ 🌑 ⟡ ˚｡ ･ ───

If there’s anything y’all wanna see added, let me know!

And (HOPEFULLY) you can mess around with different au’s too :)

Update 3/26: significantly cut down on tokens, it should work better with LLM now :)
creator: Øriøn_
